'''Syndaar''' was the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Thrasybule sector/Legends|Thrasybule sector]], near [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]]. It was the location of the [[Syndaar Military Prep School]].

{{Planet-stub}}
